summary: Front price ($3.245) sits modestly above its seasonal median (+3.3pp, -4.8% YTD vs -8.1% median) and trades at a 'slightly over' premium to fair value ($2.929 now, band $2.429-$3.429), but that premium narrows from +$0.32 today to roughly fair (+$0.16) by +21 days as the fair-value curve itself climbs with the cooling season. Weather demand is running above normal and strengthening further out (7-day +7.2% vs 5y, 8-16 day +13.2% vs 5y, both in the upper third of their range), a genuine bullish medium-term driver. Managed money is net short but sits only in the 18th percentile of its 5-year range, leaving room for short-covering, while storage remains in surplus (+175 Bcf vs 5y) with a bearish build surprise (+13 Bcf), capping upside. Short-term technicals are stretched - 5m/15m/1h RSI 63-84 with price above the upper Bollinger band on those windows - arguing for a near-term pullback toward fair value before any resumption higher; the steep Dec/Jan contango reflects normal winter seasonality, not a supply squeeze.

longTerm.entry: $3.05-$3.20 (buy dips toward the rising fair-value zone)
longTerm.sizing: 1R approx 1% account risk; scale in on the dip
longTerm.rationale: Weather demand is above 5y normal and rising further out (7.2%->13.2%), fair value is climbing toward the current price (gap narrows from +$0.32 to +$0.16 by +21D), and managed money's net-short position is only in the 18th percentile of its 5y range, leaving short-covering fuel. Storage surplus (+175 Bcf vs 5y) and Low seasonality reliability temper conviction.
longTerm.invalidation: 8-16 day weather demand rolls back below 5y normal, storage surplus widens with further bearish surprises, or price closes below $2.85.

shortTerm.sizing: 1R approx 0.5-1% account risk (tactical, reduced size given conflicting signals)
shortTerm.rationale: 5m-1h RSI 63-84 with price above the upper Bollinger band signals short-term exhaustion, front is already 'slightly over' fair value ($3.245 vs $2.929 fair), and the bearish storage surprise (+13 Bcf) adds near-term pressure even though underlying weather demand stays firm.
shortTerm.invalidation: 8-16D weather demand accelerates further above 5y normal, or price breaks and holds above $3.42 with RSI resetting off overbought, invalidating the mean-reversion setup.

keyDrivers: Weather demand above 5y normal and rising (7.2%->13.2%) as cooling season progresses
Fair-value gap narrowing over 3 weeks ($0.32->$0.16 over-fair) as fair value itself climbs
Managed money net short but at 18th 5y percentile - short-covering fuel
Storage surplus +175 Bcf vs 5y with bearish build surprise capping upside
Short-term technicals overbought (RSI 63-84, price above upper Bollinger on 5m-1h)
risks: Seasonality reliability flagged 'Low' (51pp 10-90% spread) - wide uncertainty band
Storage surplus could deepen if weather cools, reversing the bullish weather thesis
Steep Dec/Jan contango could unwind quickly on a production or storage upside surprise
disclaimer: Informational only, not financial advice. Auto-generated hourly.
